level_signals: Track record of launching ambitious products

including at least 1 year as a professional engineer.
Have a deep technical background with experience working cross-functionally with engineering teams to ship technical products.

Stay up-to-date and hands-on with AI coding tools, model capabilities, and industry trends
Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in dev tools is preferred.

scope.surface: Claude Code product suite (CLI + agentic coding tools for developers)

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($285K-$305K base)
Clear product surface and ownership area (Claude Code suite)
Encourages applications from candidates who don't meet every qualification

red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time; San Francisco only — eliminates fully-remote candidates

Most bullets in 'You might be a good fit if you' section read as requirements but are framed softly — some ambiguity between hard and soft thresholds
